steps.title: Identify the doubling time parameter
steps.content: In $f(t)=64{,}000(2)^{t/600}$, the population is multiplied by $2$ when the exponent equals $1$, i.e. when $t/600=1$.

steps.title: Apply to interpret the doubling time
steps.content: That gives $t=600$ minutes. The answer is 600.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $600$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $600$.
